    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Client
     
    ConnectionManager
     
    GlobalStats
    POJO class representing the global statistical data for a given period.
    History
     
    HistoryManager
     
    Inventory
     
    InventoryManager
     
    JDBCHistoryManager
     
    JDBCInventoryManager
     
    JDBCMedicationManager
     
    JDBCOrdersManager
     
    JDBCPharmacyManager
     
    JDBCPurchaseManager
     
    JDBCReportManager
    JDBC implementation of the ReportManager interface.
    JDBCSupplierManager
     
    JPAManager
     
    JPARoleManager
     
    JPAUserManager
     
    Main
     
    Medication
     
    MedicationList
    Wrapper class for a list of medications, used for XML serialization.
    MedicationManager
    Interface defining operations for managing medications.
    MedicationStats
    POJO class representing the statistical data for a specific medication.
    Municipality
     
    Order
     
    OrdersManager
    Interface defining operations for managing orders.
    Pharmacy
     
    PharmacyManager
    Interface defining operations for managing pharmacies.
    PharmacyWrapper
    Wrapper class representing the entire pharmacy system database for XML serialization.
    Purchase
     
    PurchaseManager
    Interface defining operations for managing purchases.
    ReportManager
    Interface defining operations for managing and generating reports.
    Role
     
    RoleManager
    Interface defining operations for managing user roles.
    SQLManager
    Manages SQL database connection and basic initialization operations.
    Supplier
     
    SupplierList
     
    SupplierManager
     
    TestDataBaseCreation
     
    User
     
    UserManager
     
    XMLManager
     
    XMLManager
